summary: Iter 7 — Re-verification of two P0 fixes from iter 6: (1) CookieConsent button contrast bug and (2) AuthContext console.error suppression for anonymous /api/auth/me 401. BOTH FIXES VERIFIED. Cookie banner buttons now have WCAG AAA contrast (17.93:1 ratio). Accept all and Essential only flows persist correct localStorage payloads. Banner stays dismissed across reload. Console no longer logs 'auth check failed' for anonymous visits (0 occurrences). Terms page renders correctly. Backend orchestrator /health endpoint returns ok=true with all 3 bus subscribers wired and emergent llm=ok.

auth_console_error_suppression.note: Zero 'auth check failed' messages from our app code. Browser-native 'Failed to load resource: 401' lines from network panel remain (these cannot be suppressed from JS — they are emitted by the browser itself, not by our axios catch block).

critical_code_review_comments: CookieConsent.jsx now uses explicit Tailwind classes (bg-neutral-900 text-white / bg-white text-neutral-900 border) — robust fix, no longer dependent on shadcn theme tokens.
AuthContext.jsx 401 suppression is correctly scoped: only silences 401 status, still logs other errors (good behavior).

Browser-native '401 Failed to load resource' lines in DevTools console are NOT from our code — they are how the browser surfaces non-2xx responses. Cannot be suppressed from JavaScript; this is expected and acceptable.
test_credentials: No creds required — anonymous landing flow tested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter-6 P0 bugs are resolved. Cookie banner buttons render with WCAG-AAA contrast (17.93:1). Anonymous /api/auth/me 401 no longer triggers console.error('auth check failed'). The only remaining console output for anonymous visits is the browser-native '401 Failed to load resource' notice, which is unavoidable from JS land. Orchestrator health endpoint working. Safe to proceed with next feature work.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — fixes verified working as expected.
